overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk across a wet city street to the Maze Bank building, exploring the entrance plaza with a large red cube sculpture, ascending curved stairs, and walking around an elevated plaza with circular water features and views of downtown Los Santos.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: white scooter passes by on the left side of the frame
crossing the street and entering the bank plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet crosswalk toward the Maze Bank building entrance

notable_agents.action: white scooter driving past the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: large curved modern bank building with beige stone facade and vertical windows
white striped pedestrian crossing on wet reflective asphalt
tall traffic signal pole with red light visible

segments.scene_description: The video opens on a city street intersection with wet pavement reflecting the clear sky. The camera walks across the crosswalk toward the Maze Bank building while a white scooter passes by on the left. Traffic lights and urban infrastructure frame the approach to the bank entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: bank entrance plaza with modern sculpture

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the Maze Bank tower signage and upper floors
approaching the large red cube sculpture in the plaza center

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the red cube sculpture and building entrance, glancing up at the tower

entered.detail: large abstract red cubic sculpture tilted on one corner in a fountain basin
MAZE BANK OF LOS SANTOS signage on the building facade above the entrance
park benches flanking the plaza entrance area

segments.scene_description: Entering the bank plaza, the scene becomes semi-sheltered under the building overhang. The camera approaches the distinctive red cube sculpture while wooden benches and potted plants line the walkway. The Maze Bank signage becomes visible high on the facade as the camera tilts upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved staircase with tiled water features

events.description: beginning to ascend the curved stairs alongside the sculpture
reaching the upper plaza level with circular water structures

agents.ego_description: walking up the curved stairs wrapping around the sculpture and reflective water features

entered.detail: curved staircase with dark tile risers and stone edges
cylindrical structures covered in reflective black tiles with water
tall residential and office towers visible behind the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the curved staircase wrapping around the plaza's water features. Black tiled cylindrical structures reflect the surroundings as the view opens up to show surrounding skyscrapers. The Maze Bank sign recedes into the background as the elevation increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with circular pools and panoramic city views

events.description: walking along the upper perimeter with panoramic views of downtown skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking around the upper plaza level viewing the water features and surrounding cityscape

entered.detail: round pools with dark reflective water and white tiled edges
elevated walkway with hanging plants connecting building sections
modern blue glass office tower with reflective windows

segments.scene_description: On the upper plaza level, the camera explores an open area with circular water pools and tiled surfaces. A pedestrian bridge with hanging plants spans across the plaza, while modern glass skyscrapers rise in the background. The Maze Bank building is now seen from behind and to the side as the camera walks the perimeter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked city intersection up into the elevated, modern plaza of the Maze Bank building. It begins by crossing a wet street reflecting a clear sky, passing a white scooter and urban infrastructure as the camera approaches the bank entrance. As the camera moves under the building's overhang, the scene shifts into a semi-sheltered plaza featuring wooden benches, potted plants, and a prominent red cube sculpture. The perspective then ascends a curved staircase wrapping around black tiled cylindrical water features, causing the street-level view to recede as the surrounding skyscrapers open up. Finally, the camera explores the upper plaza's open tiled surfaces and circular pools, passing beneath a pedestrian bridge with hanging plants while the Maze Bank building is viewed from the side against a backdrop of glass towers.
